rulings.Case Title: TSUN MING WU VS. ROGER SUN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings As To The Seventh Cause Of Action For Wrongful Eviction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 28, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANTs ROGER SUN, ELAINE HUANG's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings As To The Seventh Cause Of Action For Wrongful Eviction GRANTED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege a cause of action for common law wrongful eviction only. Plaintiff is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B in future. = (501/CPK)

rulings.Case Title: JFK TOWER, L.P. VS. TRAVIS DILLARD ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 28, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANT TRAVIS DILLARD's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD GRANTED, subject to opposition. = (501/CPK)

rulings.Case Title: MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA VS. HERMAN MCCOY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 28, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANT HERMAN MCCOY's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT GRANTED, subject to (1) Defendant providing by 9:00 a.m. a letter from a doctor confirming that Defendant takes the medication and that the medication has the effect described by Defendant (inability to wake up); and (2) Defendant posting $822 with the Court no later than July 28, 2017 by 5:00 p.m. Trial is set for August 21, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. = (501/CPK)
